title: Alphabet's Bull Trap Playing Out: Buy The AI/Advertising Leader's Selloff
content:
Lemon_tm/iStock via Getty Images

Lemon_tm/iStock via Getty Images

I previously covered Alphabet Inc., aka Google (GOOG, GOOGL, GOOG:CA) in November 2025, discussing its robust monetization cadence across advertising and cloud segments, with those efforts likely to drive the company's long-term growth prospects.

Analyst’s Disclosure: I/we have a beneficial long position in the shares of GOOG, AMZN, META, NVDA either through stock ownership, options, or other derivatives.
